overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City. The player travels along a covered commercial sidewalk with neon-lit buildings, crosses a street at the Monterey intersection, and continues under an elevated highway toward an industrial market area. The scene features futuristic architecture, distant industrial refinery towers emitting smoke, and sparse pedestrian activity under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon signage

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beside a commercial building with red neon signage, heading toward industrial towers in the distance

entered.detail: modern building facade with red neon signage and vertical light strips
tall industrial smokestacks emitting white smoke against the skyline
tall palm trees lining the edge of the covered walkway
overhead concrete and metal awning with fluorescent lighting
curved elevated highway structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered commercial sidewalk in a futuristic city. The path is sheltered by an overhang with fluorescent lighting, while palm trees line the left side. In the distance, industrial refinery towers emit smoke against a clear blue sky. A vehicle passes by on the right as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway overpass

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection area with full sky visibility
crossing the street at the Monterey intersection crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, passing the Monterey street sign, and approaching the elevated highway overpass

notable_agents.action: woman in striped shirt crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: orange street sign with white text reading 'Monterey'
white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and street lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a bright, open intersection. The Monterey street sign becomes visible on the left as the camera crosses the asphalt crosswalk. Other pedestrians are crossing in various directions. The elevated highway overpass looms ahead, and the industrial refinery towers shift to the left side of the frame as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with industrial market

events.description: passing under the elevated highway structure into the shaded underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway toward a commercial market area, passing other pedestrians on the wide sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: thick concrete columns supporting the overhead highway structure
metal beams and concrete underside of the elevated highway
commercial structures and signage visible under the overpass in the distance
metal fencing running along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the shaded area beneath the elevated highway, where the sky is mostly blocked by the overhead structure. Concrete support pillars line the left side while a chain-link fence runs along the right. The lighting becomes diffused and cooler. Ahead, commercial market structures are visible under the overpass, and a few pedestrians walk in the same direction toward this industrial marketplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial walkway into a bright city intersection and finally into the shaded depths of an industrial underpass. It begins under a fluorescent-lit overhang lined with palm trees, moving steadily forward while industrial refinery towers emit smoke against a clear blue sky in the distance. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into the bright light of the Monterey intersection, crossing an asphalt crosswalk amidst other pedestrians. The perspective then shifts toward the looming overhead structure of an elevated highway, causing the distant refinery towers to slide to the left of the frame. Finally, the camera moves into the cool, diffused light beneath the overpass, passing concrete pillars and chain-link fences toward a commercial marketplace.
